/usr/bin/c++ -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/Location.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/Button.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/ButtonMgr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/SceneLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/ConversationManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/MilestoneDatabase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/MilestoneManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/InventoryMgr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/TakeMgr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/InteractionMgr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/ImageCompression.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/GameConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/AudioManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/OpusAudio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/PauseMenuMgr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/SaveLoadMenuMgr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/DropConfirmMgr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/SaveGame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/XaiTtsClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/ItemInstance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/ItemDatabase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HighlineRidge.dir/src/ItemCombinationDatabase.cpp.o -o "Highline Ridge"  _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo -framework CoreAudio -framework AudioToolbox -framework CoreFoundation -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa /usr/local/Cellar/xz/5.8.3/lib/liblzma.dylib /usr/local/opt/jpeg-turbo/lib/libjpeg.dylib /usr/local/Cellar/opusfile/0.12_1/lib/libopusfile.dylib -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
